description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant blue exterior adorned with colorful, stylized artwork depicting two anthropomorphic melons in a cityscape under a crescent moon and starry sky. The front panel includes a large display screen, a control panel with multiple buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot area below. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'MELON FELONS' in bold, neon-like lettering with a glowing effect. The side panels are richly illustrated with the same whimsical melon characters and urban night scene, enhancing its visual appeal. The cabinet is constructed primarily from painted wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism. Its overall design is typical of classic upright arcade machines found in urban entertainment venues.
description: A blue upright arcade game cabinet with vibrant melon-themed artwork, a large screen, and a neon-lit marquee reading 'MELON FELONS'. The control panel features multiple buttons, a joystick, and a visible coin slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, display screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, and the coin slot area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the colorful melon characters and cityscape artwork on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with minimal detailing and no artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same vibrant melon and cityscape graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple round buttons arranged in a cluster, featuring a colorful control panel design.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the game title 'MELON FELONS' in neon-style text with a glowing effect on a blue and purple background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vibrant, stylized artwork of two anthropomorphic melons in a cityscape at night, with a crescent moon and stars, using a palette of blue, purple, green, and red.
